zh.St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, E: 英國薩默塞特登斯特聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Courtenay於1430年出生在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆 卡素時，她的父親Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight26歲，母親Elizabeth Hungerford28歲。她於1450年1月22日與Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1493年9月1日在英國薩默塞特登斯特享年63歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特登斯特聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Courtenay于1430年出生在英国英格兰戴文波德哈姆 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight26岁，母亲Elizabeth Hungerford28岁。她于1450年1月22日与Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset在英国英格兰戴文波德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1493年9月1日在英国薩默塞特登斯特享年63岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特登斯特聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Courtenay was born in 1430, in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Hungerford, was 28. She married Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset on 22 January 1450, in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 September 1493, in Dunster, Somerset, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Courtenay est née en 1430, à Powderham Castle, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hungerford, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset le 22 janvier 1450, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1493, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Courtenay 1430 in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hungerford 28. Sie hat am 22. Januar 1450 in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. September 1493 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England und wurde in St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset il 22 gennaio 1450, nel Powderham, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenayが1430年にイギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハム カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knightは26歳，母Elizabeth Hungerfordは28歳であった。1450年1月22日にイギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハムでSir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somersetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1493年9月1日にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで63歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトダンスタースト ジョージェ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, E: 영국 서머세트 던스터 스트 조그'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hungerford(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1450년 1월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함에서 Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 9월 1일 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 던스터 스트 조그'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Courtenay nasceu em 1430, em Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hungerford, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset em 22 de janeiro de 1450, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1493, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, E: ст джеорге'с чурч, дунстир, сомирсет, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Courtenay родилась в 1430 г. в местности поудирам кастл, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hungerford, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset 22 января 1450 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 сентября 1493 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джеорге'с чурч, дунстир, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Courtenay nació en 1430, en Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hungerford, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset el 22 de enero de 1450, en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1493, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en St George's Church, Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
